name: Chicken Cacciatore (Electric Skillet)
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, sliced and separated into rings
1 large Green pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the electric skillet to 350°F.
2. Combine flour, salt, and pepper; dredge chicken in the mixture.
3. Add 2 tablespoons oil to the skillet; sauté chicken for 4 minutes on each side until golden brown. Remove chicken and set aside.
4. Add remaining oil to the skillet; sauté onion and the next 3 ingredients (green pepper, mushrooms, garlic) until onions are translucent, about 4 minutes.
5. Stir in tomatoes and spices, breaking up tomatoes with a spoon. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to 225°F and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the chicken back into the skillet; cook for an additional 15 minutes until chicken is done.
7. Serve over hot cooked spaghetti. Serves 4 to 6.
